ddls:
CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the occupation */,
  "occupation_title" TEXT /* Title of the occupation */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of detail (e.g., total, major, detail) */,
  "employment" INTEGER /* Total employment for the occupation */,
  "employment_rse" REAL /* Relative standard error of employment */,
  "employment_per_1000_jobs" REAL /* Number of jobs per 1,000 jobs in the area */,
  "location_quotient" REAL /* Location quotient indicating local concentration of jobs */,
  "median_hourly_wage" REAL /* Median hourly wage for the occupation */,
  "mean_hourly_wage" REAL /* Mean hourly wage for the occupation */,
  "annual_mean_wage" REAL /* Annual mean wage for the occupation */,
  "mean_wage_rse" REAL /* Relative standard error of the mean wage */,
  "industry_code" TEXT /* Code categorizing the occupation by industry */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Typical education level required for the occupation */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Typical experience level required for the occupation */,
  "job_openings" INTEGER /* Number of job openings for the occupation */,
  "future_growth_outlook" TEXT /* Projected growth outlook of the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the employment statistic entry */,
  "occupation_code" TEXT /* Code for the occupation linked to this statistic */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the reported statistic */,
  "employment_value" INTEGER /* Total employment value for the year */,
  "employment_growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of employment compared to the previous year */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the region */,
  "industry_code" TEXT /* Code categorizing the occupation by industry */,
  "seasonal_adjustment" INTEGER /* Indicates if the employment data is seasonally adjusted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_statistics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_statistics_occupation_code FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_code") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "wage_statistics" (
  "wage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the wage statistic entry */,
  "occupation_code" TEXT /* Code for the occupation linked to this wage statistic */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the reported wage statistic */,
  "median_hourly_wage" REAL /* Median hourly wage for the year */,
  "mean_hourly_wage" REAL /* Mean hourly wage for the year */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the region */,
  "industry_code" TEXT /* Code categorizing the occupation by industry */,
  "wage_distribution" TEXT /* Detailed wage distribution data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wage_statistics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wage_statistics_occupation_code FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_code") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Current unemployment rate of the region */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the region */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Population growth rate of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupation_regions" (
  "occupation_code" TEXT /* Code for the occupation */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the region */,
  "employment_per_region" INTEGER /* Number of employed individuals in the region */,
  "industry_code" TEXT /* Code categorizing the occupation by industry */,
  "average_wage" REAL /* Average wage for the occupation in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_code", "region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "occupation_code" TEXT /* Code of the occupation being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the occupation data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_occupation_code FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_code") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
